name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a new-patient visit! We'd love to get you booked (it's on us). What day/time tends to work best for you? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check, or no insurance?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time for their new-patient consultation AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental on {{preferred_start}}. We can't wait to meet you.

What to expect: a relaxed 45-minute visit with zero pressure — just a friendly chat, a gentle look around, and plenty of room for any questions you've been holding onto. Our goal is simple: make dental care feel less scary.

Need to move things around? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll take care of it.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
